topics.label: Ghostscript
topics.description: Install Ghostscript to interpret PostScript. PS describes printed pages programmatically.

topics.label: Stack Operations
topics.description: push numbers, dup, exch, pop, roll. PostScript is a stack-based language like Forth.

topics.label: Drawing Commands
topics.description: moveto, lineto, curveto, stroke, fill. Draw paths on the page.

topics.label: Text & Fonts
topics.description: findfont, scalefont, setfont, show. Render text with any font.

topics.label: Graphics State
topics.description: gsave/grestore, setlinewidth, setrgbcolor, translate, rotate, scale.

topics.label: Procedures
topics.description: /name { body } def. Define reusable named procedures.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if, ifelse, for, repeat, loop. All take executable arrays (code blocks).

topics.label: Dictionaries
topics.description: dict, begin, end, def, get, put. Dictionaries are PostScript's key-value stores.
